scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @pallet-pros/web && npm run lint -w @pallet-pros/worker && npm run lint -w @pallet-pros/core
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pallet-pros/web && npm run typecheck -w @pallet-pros/worker && npm run typecheck -w @pallet-pros/core && npm run typecheck -w @pallet-pros/db
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,worker -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
